message: WMI-4 arbitrary access (copy-references-field): the access extent/source/dest is loaded from struct field 'msghdr.msg_iter' — the attacker-shaped WMI-3 content followed into an arbitrary memory access. [mechanism:copy-references-field;indicates=WMI-4] [mem:struct=msghdr;field=msg_iter;offset=16] [oracle:assert=msg_iter governs a bounded, trusted referenced operand;assume=access extent/source/dest loaded from the field]
